chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 217 & 218 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.896/2024 21.01.2026 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant On 17.05.2024, following order was passed: “Counsel has filed statement in compliance of order passed on the last date of hearing; however, on perusal of the annexed Notification we do not see as to how questions No. 1 & 2 are relevant inasmuch as the reliance has been placed on some Notification issued by the Ministry of Industries and Commerce Department, Government of Balochistan. Counsel needs time to rephrase the questions. Adjourned. Office to place copy of this order in the connected Reference Application” No rephrased questions of law have been placed on record and no justification for default has been articulated. In view hereof these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
